programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After finding his wife and two children dead, a former Indiana state trooper spends 13 years trying to clear his name.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the journalists who exposed the dangers of cult leader Reverend Jim Jones; interviews with witnesses to murders carried out by Jones' followers.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Using DNA testing and a photographer's diary, a retired detective reopens a cold case involving the death of a beautiful young mother.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A car belonging to a missing man erupts in a blaze, leading to clues regarding his whereabouts.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators look for answers when a popular school superintendent is found dead in his western New York home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A double homicide in upstate New York leads detectives on a cross-country investigation to piece together a case with a surprising suspect at the center.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Drew Peterson speaks out about the murder of his third wife and the disappearance of his fourth wife in his first network TV interview in more than a decade; insiders close to the case speak out, including Stacy Peterson's sister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a months-long homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a fatal betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 21-year-old college senior is shot and killed in a public park just months before her graduation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Months after a woman and her husband come down with the same mysterious illness, the woman dies after experiencing the same symptoms; old recordings reveal the twisted truth about her demise.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Nearly 40 years after a high school senior is found stabbed to death in her car after visiting the mall days before Christmas, investigators identify the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Robert Davis, who was convicted of murdering a woman and her son, claims his confession was coerced and tries to prove he is innocent.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man convicted of murdering a woman in her upscale Austin, Texas, home tells his story for the first time.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Reunion)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the Flavorettes from season 2 are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Casting Special
programme.desc: From twins to super freaks, peep the girls vying for Flav's heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Drew moves out, there's a break-in at the loft, and Fiona fears for her safety. Someone from Dallas' past pays him a surprise visit. A tough assignment forces Zig to think about the mistakes he's made.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Larry King Now: Floyd Mayweather

programme.title: Larry King Now: Oprah Winfrey
programme.desc: Larry sits down with media mogul Oprah Winfrey to talk about her personal experiences with racism, the future of the Oprah Winfrey Network, and her new role in the civil rights film, Lee Daniels' The Butler.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Forest Whitaker and Lee Daniels

programme.title: Larry King Now: Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield
programme.desc: Larry gets an earful from Iron Mike Tyson and Evander 'The Real Deal' Holyfield on their infamous 1997 bout, the current state of boxing and their new mission to feed the hungry with Yank Barry, the Founder of Global Village Champions.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terrence Howard
programme.desc: Uncensored and candid, Terrence Howard tackles everything from his ideal woman to Oprah to his (necessary) arrogance. Plus, he reveals the role he really wanted in The Butler, and why it’s hard out there for a pim-- er, Oscar nominee.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terry Crews
programme.desc: The actor and ex-athlete is all candor as he discusses his awe over the Golden Globes win, how he saved his marriage, and why this man calls himself a feminist. Plus, Larry gets a pec pop tutorial.

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the salesman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A maid is accused of killing an employer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a member of the Law Club disappears, it becomes apparent that each of the students in Matlock's law class had a motive. Matlock wonders if he taught someone how to commit the perfect crime, and sets out to discover if it really was.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Grace Unger Maitland, a successful commercial producer is murdered, a disgruntled director, Peter Angelli takes the rap. Despite Michelle Thomas’ pleas, Matlock will not take the case – he’s got a house to paint

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A chemist has developed a miracle hair restorer. He cons a man into swiping the multi-million dollar formula so that he can then sell it out from underneath his employers. Murder ensues and the man finds himself in a "hairy" situation.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The attraction is fatal! Matlock defends an obsessive suitor framed for allegedly murdering the love of his life, a dating service candidate so repelled by his presence that she had a restraining order to keep him away.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is confronted with a dilemma. He knows his client, Phyllis Todd, is innocent of murder, but he strongly suspects she has allowed herself to be accused of the crime to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.desc: Josh Altman goes full hipster in his last ditch effort to sell an architectural wonder in a trendy Venice neighborhood; Tracy takes over a stale listing in Brentwood and attempts to revive the grandeur of the historic Georgian estate.

programme.desc: Michael tasks James and brother David with finding him a development opportunity, leading to a visit to the house where the movie, "Mommie Dearest," was filmed; Josh Flagg battles his control issues while teaming up with Bobby.

programme.desc: In an attempt to sell a villa that has sat on the market for a year, Josh Altman rents a dunk tank to entice buyers; James and David enter heated negotiations involving the Playboy Bunny Ranch and the "Mommie Dearest" house.

programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts; Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Cinnamon go it alone to recover a reel of recording wire containing information on a chemical warfare project aimed at the U.S.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Enemy agent Janos Passik is preparing to train 200 foreign agents to infiltrate the U.S. and engage in some form of bacteriological warfare.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The wife of a deceased scientist, Kurt Zubrovnik, is being pressured by Eastern forces to work for them.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Anastas Poltroni is the head of an international narcotics syndicate, and has taken refuge in a country with no extradition treaty. The IM Force is assigned to lure him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Double-agent Elena Del Barra is acting bizarrely, sending a microfilm of defense secrets from her own country. Rollin is sent in to investigate and return the microfilm without its theft ever being detected.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A defector has been targeted by two rival groups from the same foreign country. The team is to discredit the younger group, so that the U.S. can more easily handle the old-line group.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must get hold of a hoard of Nazi gold through four young men, sons of Hitler's top aides, who are sent to Switzerland to meet for the first time and pool their parts of the "puzzle" together.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dr. Cherlotov, a scientist of an enemy power, failed to defect to the West when his wife did. Now that he has developed a cheap, effective anti-ballistic system, the IMF is ordered to get him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From the Pharos of Alexandria to modern automated buoys, lighthouse history features personal stories of keepers, daring construction, and optical discoveries; today these structures become inns and retreats as navigation advances.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Wine remains culturally integral as Napoleon drowned sorrows and Jefferson became obsessed; modern consumption peaks with wines from Australia, Chile, South Africa using NASA aerial imaging technology for soil analysis and vine vigor assessment.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold y Gerald descubren que han filmado a un hombre sospechoso que deja un sobre en un árbol y lo siguen pista a pista / En un esfuerzo por ganar un concurso de poesía de clase, Phoebe copia un poema de un libro y se siente culpable.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Cansada de amarlo y odiarlo a la vez, Helga compra una poción para perder todos sus sentimientos por Arnold, y todo otro sentimiento / Gerald revela que no puede andar en bicicleta y Arnold le ayuda a superar su miedo y humillación.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold intenta ayudar a su abuelo jugando un torneo de damas chinas contra su antiguo rival. Miriam se va de la ciudad las mismas semanas que Big Bob y Helga tiene la semana libre.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold compite cada año en un concurso de comida en el partido del bloque. Rhonda pierde la tarjeta ocular y obtiene lentes. Ella es etiquetada como un geek y se ve obligada a salir con los chicos geeky.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold dirige una campaña para salvar el árbol más antiguo en el vecindario. El Sr. Simmons es aceptado por Arnold y el resto de la clase como su nuevo maestro después de ser atormentado por un mal sustituto.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Eugene se decepciona al saber que su héroe preferido no hace sus propias acrobacias. Arnold y la pandilla hacen un viaje escolar a la ópera y tienen sus propios sueños musicales.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween, el vecindario sucumbe a la idea de los extraterrestres, cuando Arnold y Gerald transmiten un programa en la radio anunciando que han aterrizado naves espaciales.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Después de que se anuncian los resultados de una prueba de aptitud, Harold gana confianza en sí mismo y Helga se siente más tonta / Arnold convence a Oskar de que, por una vez, se levante del sofá y consiga un trabajo temporal.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá desea tener una vida más simple y decide convertir la casa de los Turner en una granja. / Cuando comienzan a aparecer los monstruos en Dimmsdale, el Señor Crocker inicia un show para exponerlos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp, Chopper, and Nami get trapped in a coffin after being slashed by a zombie samurai. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats make short work of some haunted paintings!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami gives love advice to a zombie, Luffy finds himself face-to-face with Gecko Moria, and Robin gets caught in spooky spider web. Things look bleak for the Straw Hats until their skeleton friend lends a hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook strikes the final blow in his battle with the spider monkey, Gecko Moria's devious plan is revealed, and Luffy's escape attempt leads to the loss of something he can't live without!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook tells Franky and Robin the secret to slaying zombies, and Gecko Moria reveals the terrifying monster that will be the recipient of Luffy's shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's shadow is forced into the body of a monster, Usopp and Chopper get incinerated, and Nami is kidnapped by a zombie who wants to make her his wife!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gecko Moria's minions struggle with the burden of feeding a giant zombie brought to life by Luffy's shadow. Meanwhile, Brook flashes back to a battle that almost cost him his beloved afro!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets out to regain his shadow and convince Brook to join the crew. Meanwhile, Sanji races to stop Nami's zombie wedding before it's too late!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp's naturally negative personality makes him the only Straw Hat who stands a chance against Perona's depressing army of ghosts, and Chopper prepares to do battle against his hero, Dr. Hogback!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Brook is overmatched by the zombie samurai, Zoro steps in to help the skeleton get his shadow back. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares for a battle with Gecko Moria, and Sanji interrupts an undead wedding!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Franky and Brook watch in awe, Zorro and the zombie samurai wage a sword-slinging battle the likes of which the world has never seen before!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria's mansion is reduced to ruins as the zombie with Luffy's shadow stalks the Straw Hats! As the walls come tumbling down, Chopper puts the hurt on Hogback, and Nami vanishes right before Sanji's eyes!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians discover that Prospero's renewed magic is wreaking havoc with the technology of the world. He is recreating an idyllic forest utopia.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Should they stay or should they go: Those remaining on the Ark must come to terms with the inevitable. Meanwhile, Clarke and Finn find themselves facing a new enemy.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: It's the end of the world as we know it in the first season finale as the conflict on the ground comes to a head and the situation on the Ark comes to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Clarke is still trapped, while the fate of Bellamy, Finn & Raven is still unknown. Meanwhile, the survivors of the Ark face a dangerous new world.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Clarke demands answers from President Wallace. Kane interrogates one of The 100, and Abby performs emergency surgery. Meanwhile, Octavia resorts to violence to find Lincoln.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems. When Clarke (ELIZA TAYLOR) discovers a horrifying project being carried out in Mount Weather's medical ward, she joins forces with an unlikely ally.

programme.title: The 100

programme.title: Arrow
programme.desc: A mission takes Oliver, Felicity, and the team to Russia, where they meet up with Oliver's old friend, Anatoly (David Nykl); Lance gets out of rehab.

programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.desc: Joseph uses his Stand to generate a spirit message from a TV, only to receive a warning claiming that Kakyoin is a traitor. Meanwhile, Jotaro, Ann and Kakyoin are out exploring Singapore when Kakyoin begins acting strangely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.desc: Kurapika heads to the auction site to confirm the death of the Phantom Troupe's leader for himself.

programme.desc: Soichiro Yagami demands to meet with L in person when he finds out that L has secretly brought FBI agents into Japan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Josuke Higashikata! Meets Angelo
programme.desc: Josuke informs Jotaro about his encounter with Angelo’s Stand. Deducing that the serial killer’s Stand is capable of entering people’s bodies, Jotaro tells Josuke over the phone to stay on high alert until he arrives at his home.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Jotaro learn that a man with a bow and arrow was responsible for awakening Angelo’s Stand ability. Realizing the town is still in danger, they decide to find the bow and arrow before it can create any more victims.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the Nijimura Brothers’ house to rescue Koichi, who is in critical condition after getting shot by Keicho Nijimura’s bow and arrow. But when Josuke steps into the house, he is attacked by Keicho’s Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Nijimura Brothers, Part 3
programme.desc: After defeating Keicho, Koichi insists they find the bow and arrow and destroy it. Josuke agrees, but when the two enter the attic where the bow and arrow are being kept, they hear an inhuman noise inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Koichi Hirose (Reverb)
programme.desc: On his way to school, Koichi finds himself blackmailed by a man named Tamami Kobayashi, who frames him for running over a cat. A panicked Koichi starts to feel guilty for his actions when suddenly a giant lock appears on his chest!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Toshikazu Hazamada (Show Off)
programme.desc: Josuke and Koichi get info that a student at their school, Toshikazu Hazamada may be a Stand user and decide to look into the case. Their suspicions are quickly confirmed after Hazamada’s wooden doll morphs into an exact copy of Josuke and attacks them.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi is both surprised and excited when a girl named Yukako Yamagishi says she likes him. But Koichi’s joy quickly turns into fear after Yukako begins to express her love for him in very erratic and dangerous ways.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 2
programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1
programme.desc: Chili Pepper suddenly appears before Josuke to test his Stand powers. Josuke puts up a fight but is overwhelmed by Chili Pepper’s power. The next day, Josuke and friends learn from Jotaro that a man who can locate Chili Pepper is heading to Morioh

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends gather at the Port to try and reach Joseph Joestar before Chili Pepper. Speculating the enemy is hiding nearby, Jotaro orders Josuke and Koichi to stay behind and find Chili Pepper’s user while he and Okuyasu go protect Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: We Picked Up Something Crazy!
programme.desc: With Akira Otoishi arrested and the bow and arrow safely recovered, peace seemingly returns to Morioh. But Josuke’s life is far from peaceful as he struggles to deal with his father, whose old age is making things difficult for them to bond.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi and Hazamada visit the home of Rohan Kishibe, a popular manga artist whom they are huge fans of. Much to their joy, Rohan not only agrees to sign autographs but also invites them to take a tour of his workspace.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 2
programme.desc: Koichi is drawn back to Rohan’s house, where he sees the manga artist finishing up his next manga at an incredible speed. Rohan uses his stand Heaven’s Door on Koichi again to gain further creative inspiration from the young boy’s life experience.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go Hunting!
programme.desc: Jotaro and Josuke must hunt down a rat that is believed to have become a Stand user after being shot by the bow and arrow. When the two arrive at the site, they find dozens of dead rats killed in the most bizarre fashion.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Rohan Kishibe's Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu become friends with a Stand user named Shigekiyo Yangu, a.k.a. Shigechi, who can use his Stand to find and collect the money that is scattered across town. Impressed by the boy’s abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and friends try to cash in the winning lottery ticket they found. However, the bank clerk is not convinced they’re the actual owners of the ticket, placing the three teens into a tough spot as they try to talk their way through their big lie.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Dreams of Cinderella
programme.desc: Yukako, depressed because she can’t get Koichi to return her feelings, comes across a beauty salon where the owner claims a special beauty treatment will help customers find love and happiness…

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 1
programme.desc: A man named Yoshikage Kira is enjoying his lunch break at the park with a sandwich in hand. But his peaceful afternoon is cut short when Shigechi accidentally takes Kira’s sandwich bag, believing it to be his own.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira is revealed to be the serial killer who’s been lurking in Morioh, and a Stand user as well. Having discovered his secret, Shigechi tries to fight off Kira with his Harvest, only to suffer fatal wounds from the killer’s Stand, Deadly Queen

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 2
programme.desc: Kira is forced to appear before Koichi after his remote Heart Attack bomb is made useless by the boy’s new Stand, Reverb Act 3. Finally coming face-to-face with the serial killer, Koichi attacks him with Act 3.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Father
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends are at Yoshikage Kira’s home trying to find any clues that may lead them to the serial killer, who has gone into hiding under a new face and identity.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos abordan el crucero St. Anne gracias a los boletos proporcionados por Jessie y James disfrazados. Su más reciente plan es atraer entrenadores Pokémon hacia el barco para robar sus Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Una tormenta obliga a todos, excepto al Equipo Rocket y a nuestros héroes, a abandonar el zozobrante St. Anne. Ash, Brock y Misty deben hacer equipo con sus antiguos enemigos para sobrevivir esta bochornosa situación.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket sobreviven contra toda posibilidad al hundimiento del St. Anne, se ven arrastrados a otra peligrosa situación cuando son atacados por el Pokémon Gyarados.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando unos Tentacool interfieren con la construcción de un hotel, una mujer ofrece una recompensa a quien pueda repelerlos. Sin embargo, nuestros héroes deben entrar en acción cuando la treta del Equipo Rocket falla.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a un pequeño pueblo porteño donde se celebra un festival de verano. Para recuperarse de su duro viaje, Ash y sus amigos deciden relajarse y disfrutar las festividades.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos ven a un grupo de Butterfree volando sobre el océano, Ash decide liberar a su propio Butterfree. Luego de ser rechazado una vez, ¿podrá el Butterfree de Ash ganar el corazón de su rosado amor?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos finalmente llegan a Ciudad Azafrán, donde una jovencita está al mando de un gimnasio Pokémon con sus poderes psíquicos. ¡Si Ash derrota a la líder de gimnasio Sabrina, ganará su cuarta medalla de gimnasio!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante Sabrina, Ash debe atrapar a un Pokémon tipo Fantasma para acabar con el tipo Psíquico de la líder del Gimnasio Azafrán. Se dirige hacia la Torre Pokémon en Pueblo Lavanda, donde se dice que habitan.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de dejar la Torre Pokémon acompañados de Haunter, Ash regresa a Ciudad Azafrán con una sola meta en mente: ¡ganar una Medalla de Gimnasio de la poderosa Líder de Gimnasio tipo Psíquico, Sabrina!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando Ash intenta atrapar a un Mankey salvaje, este pierde el control y usa Golpe contra todo el grupo; ¡incluso roba la gorra de Ash! ¿Encontrará Ash la forma de apaciguar a este belicoso Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras insultar el perfume de la Líder de Gimnasio Erika en una tienda departamental, Ash debe ir a extremos increíbles para poder poner un pie en el Gimnasio Celadon, ¡sin mencionar el considerarlo digno de retarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: La Oficial Jenny revela que una ola de sueño afecta al área desde hace varios días. Nuestros héroes sospechan que tiene que ver con la desaparición de varios niños y el porqué los Pokémon no mejoran en el Centro Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ante la insistente petición de Brock, nuestros héroes hacen una parada en un lugar bien conocido por los criadores Pokémon por sus salones de belleza Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: A las afueras de Ciudad Fucsia, nuestros héroes se encuentran con Hitmonchan, un Pokémon tipo Pelea. Sin pensarlo, Ash lo enfrenta, pero Pikachu y él son derrotados. ¿Quién es el misterioso entrenador de este Hitmonchan?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón sumerge a Ciudad Grisácea en la oscuridad, Ash y sus amigos van a investigar a la planta de energía cercana, donde encuentran a Magnemite y un huésped de Grimer. ¿Serán responsables del apagón en la ciudad?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, Misty y Pikachu se encuentran muy perdidos en las montañas. Mientras se apresuran por un camino irregular que no aparece en su mapa, ¡de repente oyen una gran explosión!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡En su camino hacia el siguiente reto de Batalla de Gimnasio parece que se han perdido. ¡Ash y sus amigos llegan a una enorme mansión que parece ser la guarida oculta de un ninja! ¿Acaso será el Gimnasio Fucsia?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de tomar el lugar de la herida Lara, ¿podrá Ash controlar a su feroz Ponyta y guiarlo para ganar la carrera anual?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes acompañan a la Oficial Jenny al interior del bosque en persecución de unos cazadores. Pronto descubren a un niño en medio de una manada de Kangaskhan. Su nombre es Tommy y nadie sabe el secreto de su infancia.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de encontrar un muy largo puente que sólo puede cruzarse en bicicleta, un trabajo repartiendo medicina es el boleto perfecto para que Ash y sus amigos lleguen a Pueblo Soleado.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Atrapados en un repentino chubasco, nuestros héroes rápidamente buscan refugio. Tras arrastrar a una renuente Misty, Ash y Brock entran a una cabaña, ¡y de inmediato tienen la impresión de que no están solos!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos descubren a un grupo de Pikachu salvajes, y aunque al principio parecen asustados por el intruso, el grupo eventualmente confía en el Pikachu de Ash. ¿Qué sentirá Pikachu al ver a otros como él en la naturaleza?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos encuentran una enorme casa con una fiesta de jardín en marcha a la que asisten los Entrenadores de los Pokémon que evolucionan usando Rocas Evolutivas. ¿Estará aquí el Entrenador del Eevee abandonado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros hambrientos héroes llegan a una pequeña aldea. A cambio de una comida, Ash, Misty y Brock aceptan investigar qué está causando que se seque el río, lo cual destruye la cosecha de la aldea.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Acompañamos a nuestros héroes a las afueras de Ciudad Oscura, la cual parece estar desierta. No hay nadie en las calles, incluso a mediodía. ¿Qué volvió a este un lugar tan desolado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash entrena rigurosamente incluso en las vacaciones de primavera, ¡hasta que nuestros héroes descubren que hay un carnaval rodante cercano! ¡Ash, Misty y Brock pronto se unen a la diversión de la feria!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Aún en persecución de nuestros héroes, el Equipo Rocket está listo para otro intento de atrapar a Pikachu, ¡hasta que el desastre se presenta! Pronto se vuelve evidente que Meowth está enfermándose.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Haciendo a un lado su idea de atrapar a Jigglypuff por ahora, Misty promete hallar una solución para la situación de canto de este Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Según el rival de Ash, Gary, se han descubierto fósiles de Pokémon extintos en el área, iniciando una gran fiebre de fósiles en el cañón. ¡Ash decide unirse a las excavaciones para tratar de derrotar a Gary!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash duerme pacíficamente hasta que es despertado por Brock y Misty con alarmantes noticias: ¡Algo le pasa a la voz de Pikachu! Preocupado, Ash corre con Pikachu en busca del Centro Pokémon más cercano.

programme.desc: El dedo de un pianista se corta accidentalmente y se pierde hasta que su esposa y su perro llegan a la sala de emergencias; el marcapasos de un hombre lo está matando, pero lo mantiene con vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una tortuga caimán mordedora está sujeta al cuello de un hombre y no la suelta; un médico de emergencias corre contra un huracán inminente; y un podador de árboles está a 20 pies sobre el suelo cuando es atravesado por su motosierra.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre choca su auto contra una vaca y llega a la sala de emergencias cubierto de estiércol.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre es llevado de urgencia a la sala de emergencias, aparentemente arañado por un tigre; un paciente dice que le han disparado en la cabeza; una mujer tiene muerte cerebral, pero un médico cree que puede salvarse.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña entra a la sala de emergencias y no puede moverse de la cintura para abajo. Sus padres están enojados cuando los médicos la enviaron a su casa una semana antes.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un soldado llega a la sala de emergencias con una puñalada y una mujer toma una sobredosis de píldoras de dieta.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un golfista que no responde necesita una cirugía inmediata para salvarle la vida; 3 adultos casi desnudos causan estragos en la sala de emergencias; y un corredor de maratón empuja sus límites demasiado lejos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer embarazada recibe un disparo en el abdomen, pero se niega a someterse a pruebas y tratamientos, poniendo en peligro su vida y la del bebé; una doctora es víctima de un robo de auto y cree que su paciente puede ser el culpable.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pila de paneles de yeso se derrumba sobre un niño de 12 años. Cuando una mujer griega se queja de dolor abdominal, la Dra. Angelique Campen está decidida a descubrir la causa, a pesar de que otros médicos no han encontrado nada.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La sala de emergencias se convierte en un lugar peligroso cuando se encuentran drogas de contrabando en el vientre de un paciente; un médico está desconcertado por múltiples ataques cardíacos en una familia.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre adulto grita sin cesar sin razón, una madre joven está alerta pero helada, y un niño parece tener una sobredosis de drogas, pero lo niega.

programme.desc: Growing to over 1400 lbs, the blue fin tuna is a true titan prowling the oceans, and it's extremely powerful and fast. To help protect these endangered giants, Cyril is recruited by a team of biologists to travel up the East Coast of the USA and Canada.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: On the rio Parana in northern Argentina, countless fishermen have been violently pulled into the water by unidentified creatures and some have even mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty wraps up trapping season with a record haul of fur; Morgan flies solo for the first time over the towering peaks of the Great Alaska Range.

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself asking a LOT of questions after she agrees to transport a seller's loved one named Bruce.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Todd and Tamera take on some Monsters in a move that proves to be anything but cinematic.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc takes on an antique camper and Dusty transports a sculpture.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1800s black powder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: As Rick and Cindy try to give up smoking at an auction in Leslieville, they cope by making sure everyone else suffers right along with them.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy’s hilarious “Paul" disguise causes mirth and mayhem at an auction in downtown Toronto.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart declare storage war on the veterans at an auction in Orillia. Roy bums a ride off them instead. Ursula has a bad hair day, and Rick and Cindy meet former Stanley Cup Champion Nick Kypreos.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy antagonizes the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans. Rick preaches caution, but Cindy goes for the big score.

programme.desc: Kirk investigates a planet with an Earth-like 1920's gangster culture.

programme.desc: Kirk becomes involved in an arms race when the Klingons equip a native people with superior weaponry.

programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a planet devastated by disease that appears to treat the American flag with great reverence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.desc: The imminent death of Kira's Cardassian "father" rekindles painful memories of losing her real father.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Alec Colson is claiming he has shocking proof that the government is covering up a liaison with aliens, and that Earth was almost destroyed by an alien invasion, Colson gives all nations involved 24 hours to come clean or he'll do it for them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c and Bra'tac have just returned from the planet Ha'ktyl, where they tried to convince the warrior-woman rebel leader Ishta, to wait until her fellow insurgent Jaffa grow numerous enough to wage war against all the Goa'uld system lords at once.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone gets a taste of the underworld in Brooklyn with Johnny Torrio. Reuniting in Chicago, they start bootlegging and anger local Irish gangsters.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Writers' Room

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it’s supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn’t going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting for a hundred years.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Don Martín y Hortencia logran escapar del sanatorio, Bustillo ordena a los guardias que los busquen, pero no los hallan. Gabriela está arrepentida por no escuchar las advertencias de sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Fernando enfurece al no encontrar las joyas que Gabriela tiene guardadas, se pone a la defensiva cuando Norma llega con Eva a revisar la casa. Dínora amenaza a Gabriela para que no grite.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Paula que se atenga a las consecuencias y la amenaza con hacerle la vida imposible, si ella decide no vender su parte. Ambos se declaran la guerra. Emilio habla con su hija, ella siente algo especial por el supuesto amigo de Modesto.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Rosa descubre los juegos sexuales de Sofía con su esposo. Miguel se asusta y Sofía trata de controlar la situación. Juan descubre que su matrimonio es una mentira. Está muy decidido a hacerles la vida imposible a Paula y su mamá.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde el control y golpea peligrosamente a Sofía, pero miente sobre lo que hizo. Es tanta la presión y la rabia, que se desmaya. Gaspar descubre las mentiras de José sobre Paula y la herencia, y está decidido a revelarlas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Gabriela y se ofrece para reparar el daño, atestiguando en contra de Antonia. Lagarto también podría ser un testigo clave. Ricardo hace el amor con Inés y les toman fotografías. Patricia recibe las fotos y llora de rabia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Patricia hace un discurso memorable contra Antonia y despierta la admiración de todos. Aníbal pronto estará de alta, pero le ofrece dinero al médico para que lo deje en el hospital. Lucho Vampa le roba a Antonia y Rodrigo corta relaciones con ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro golpea con una rabia descontrolada a Macario y termina en la comisaría. Por ahora, no podrá salir de prisión. Constanza y Gastón encuentran un sobre con la llave de una bóveda de un banco y una tarjeta electrónica con la foto de Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucho e Irene descubren que Antonia es la dueña del prostíbulo La casa de las muñecas. Alejandro está encarcelado en el mismo lugar que el Lagarto. Rodrigo pide una orden de registro para entrar en casa de Guerra.
